recommendations.title: Maniac Cop 2
recommendations.overview: Undead cop Matt Cordell rises from the grave, and is after the criminals who murdered him in prison.

recommendations.title: Maniac Cop
recommendations.overview: A killer dressed in a police uniform begins murdering innocent people on the streets of New York City.

recommendations.title: Maniac
recommendations.overview: A psychotic man, troubled by his childhood abuse, kills and mutilates young women and local models on the streets of New York City.

recommendations.title: Vigilante
recommendations.overview: New York City factory worker Eddie Marino is a solid citizen and regular guy, until the day a sadistic street gang brutally assaults his wife and murders his child. When a corrupt judge sets the thugs free, he goes berserk and vows revenge.

recommendations.title: Army of Darkness
recommendations.overview: Ash, a handsome, shotgun-toting, chainsaw-armed department store clerk, is time warped backwards into England's Dark Ages, where he romances a beauty and faces legions of the undead.

recommendations.title: The Room
recommendations.overview: Kate and Matt discover that a part of their house can grant wishes. In the wake of two miscarriages, what they want most is a child.

recommendations.title: Barbie as the Island Princess
recommendations.overview: Young Rosella is saved by a few kind animals after a shipwreck. Now called Ro, she learns to talk to animals. One day, she saves the life of a prince and returns to civilisation to discover her past.

recommendations.title: Taste of Fear
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound young girl returns to her father's estate after ten years, and although she's told he's away, she keeps seeing his dead body on the estate.

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: Birth/Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A single mother and a childless morgue technician are bound together by their relationship to a little girl they have reanimated from the dead.
